title: Looking for an expert to help set up Monday.com
excerpt: Looking for someone to help set up our monday.com. For a marketing team, so from clients completing a form, to it then been allocated to the right person/s, and then been monitored. We are based in South Africa

posts.author: warwickbb (Warwick)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking for someone to help set up our monday.com. For a marketing team, so from clients completing a form, to it then been allocated to the right person/s, and then been monitored. We are based in South Africa

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @warwickbb and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

This is a perfect use case for monday.com and one that the team at CarbonWeb is very familiar with! Before we were a Channel Partner with monday we operated (and still do) as a full-suite digital marketing agency. I’d be happy to discuss the ways in which we have enhanced our workflow and the workflow’s of our clients!

If you’d like to have an initial call, you can schedule with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @warwickbb ,

Welcome to the monday community forum!

Our team at thespelas.com can without a doubt help you .

We are experts at working with monday and we have also worked with Marketing Agencies in the past. Consequently, we are very familiar with a marketing agency’s needs, and we also have a great deal of experience with monday’s own Marketer Product.

We can create a workflow expertly made to fit all your company’s needs, with time-saving automations and integrations with any product you might use.

Please do set up a meeting with us here so you can better explain to us your requirements and vision.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Greetings @warwickbb and welcome to the community!

At upstream, we are proud to offer our expertise as Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners, and the APAC Partner of the Year for 2020.

We are also thrilled to announce that we have recently been awarded the 2022 Professional Partners of the Year award. Our company is based in Australia, but we have a dedicated and experienced global staff network that can meet your needs.

Our Solutions Engineers and full stack Development Team specialise in integrations and custom requirements, and we are confident in our ability to provide valuable support to your organisation. posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @warwickbb,

Welcome to the monday.com community!

Since you are based in South Africa and looking for someone who could help you with the setup of monday. com Work OS, I would suggest you get in touch with certified monday.com consultants and seek end-to-end consultation before the implementation. By seeking consultation from a certified professional, you can create streamlined workflows for your marketing teams, which in turn, improves the productivity and efficiency of your marketing personnel.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
